free_text: Statistical and non-statistical effects in the alpha-
Thin 24Mg targets (40 mu-g/cm2) were prepered by
carbon backings of about 10 mu-g/cm2. The required
thickness of 40 mu-g/cm2 was achieved by employing the
so-called swing quartz method during evaporation
10 degr apart from each other in the angular range
25-165 degr in the lab system. In addition a monitor
each counter was checked independently by comparing
cross sections at low alpha-particle energies.
from F0628003). Small corrections in all Subents.
